vocab.meaning: một buổi tập luyện cường độ cao/kiệt sức
vocab.example: I find immense satisfaction in completing a grueling workout at the gym, as it pushes my physical endurance to the limit.
Swimming is often cited as one of the most effective ways to burn calories while minimizing the risk of injury.
Long-distance running is less about physical strength and more about the mental fortitude required to keep going when your body wants to stop.

vocab.meaning: giành chiến thắng (thường là vào phút chót hoặc một cách quyết liệt)
vocab.example: There’s no feeling quite like the moment your team manages to clinch a victory in the final seconds of a match.

vocab.meaning: tăng cường sự nhanh nhẹn/linh hoạt
vocab.example: Racket sports like badminton are superb for those looking to enhance their agility and reflexes.
Engaging in competitive sports is the perfect antidote to the sedentary lifestyle that many office workers lead today.

vocab.meaning: khả năng thể thao thuần túy/đỉnh cao
vocab.example: I love watching gymnastics because the sheer athleticism displayed by the performers is absolutely breathtaking.
A quick game of basketball after work helps to rejuvenate my mind and provides a much-needed break from academic stress.
Team sports are invaluable for young people as they teach the importance of cooperation and building a strong team spirit.

vocab.meaning: trải qua quá trình huấn luyện khắt khe
vocab.example: To compete at a professional level, athletes must undergo rigorous training sessions that last for several hours every day.
